source: SEARCH for Diabetes in Youth Study

seasonal_patterns.t1d_explanation: Winter peak linked to vitamin D fluctuation and viral infections
seasonal_patterns.t2d_explanation: Back-to-school physical exams detecting asymptomatic hyperglycemia

racial_ethnic_disparities.comparison: Annual percent increases for T1D and T2D were higher among racial and ethnic minority youth than non-Hispanic White youth

adult_contrast.note: Adult incidence declining while youth incidence rising — diverging trends
